name: part_009
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: Showcase of the 'Talking Puppy MOCOCO Plushie'.
Showcase of the 'Fuwawa & Mococo to GO☆ Finger Puppets'.
Overview of the Birthday Sets and purchase bonuses.
Fuwawa and Mococo recap the merchandise live on stage.
The duo introduces a mystery guest for the birthday live.
The guest, Kuro-chan, arrives on stage and exchanges greetings.
Kuro-chan attempts to introduce himself in English.

subtitles.original: おしゃべりパッピーMOCOCOぬいぐるみのふわもこだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm the Talking Puppy MOCOCO Plushie, Fuwamoco!

subtitles.original: ぎゅっとすると色々と喋るよ！
subtitles.english: If you squeeze me, I'll say all kinds of things!

subtitles.original: どんなボイスが出るかお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Look forward to hearing what voices I have!

subtitles.original: We have the Fuwawa and Mococo to GO☆ Finger Puppets!
subtitles.english: We have the Fuwawa and Mococo to GO☆ Finger Puppets!

subtitles.original:
They both come with one extra Ruffians kigurumi costume
you can dress up in and bring around with you everywhere!
subtitles.english:
They both come with one extra Ruffians kigurumi costume
you can dress up in and bring around with you everywhere!

subtitles.original: FUWAWAとMOCOCOの指パペット！
subtitles.english: FUWAWA and MOCOCO Finger Puppets!

subtitles.original:
どこでも一緒に連れていけるサイズで、
着せ替えラフィアンズ衣装もあるよ！
subtitles.english:
They're a size you can take anywhere,
and they come with a Ruffians costume!

subtitles.original:
Finally, we have two different ASMR voice packs:
"Back from a Fluffy Date♡" from Fuwawa...
subtitles.english:
Finally, we have two different ASMR voice packs:
"Back from a Fluffy Date♡" from Fuwawa...

subtitles.original: ...and "Sweet and Fuzzy Needy Puppy" from Mococo.
subtitles.english: ...and "Sweet and Fuzzy Needy Puppy" from Mococo.

subtitles.original:
ASMRボイスは、英語と日本語、
両方で収録してます！
subtitles.english:
The ASMR voices are recorded in
both English and Japanese!

subtitles.original:
They make our hearts beat so fast!
Be ready to blush when you take a listen to them!
subtitles.english:
They make our hearts beat so fast!
Be ready to blush when you take a listen to them!

subtitles.original:
The merch is separated into two sets:
Fuwawa's Birthday Merch and Mococo's Birthday Merch.
subtitles.english:
The merch is separated into two sets:
Fuwawa's Birthday Merch and Mococo's Birthday Merch.

subtitles.original:
If you purchase the full set, they come with bonuses,
including a cheki-style card with a special bonus voice!
subtitles.english:
If you purchase the full set, they come with bonuses,
including a cheki-style card with a special bonus voice!

subtitles.original:
グッズはふわわセットと
もここセットに分かれています！
subtitles.english:
The merch is divided into
the Fuwawa set and Mococo set!

subtitles.original:
セットごとにチェキ風カードと
特典ボイスが付きます！
subtitles.english:
Each set comes with a cheki-style card
and a bonus voice!

subtitles.original:
The regular version will have a foil-stamped replica
signature and message, so it'll be just as cute!
subtitles.english:
The regular version will have a foil-stamped replica
signature and message, so it'll be just as cute!

subtitles.original: 数量限定セットは、直筆サイン入りだよ！
subtitles.english: The limited-edition set includes a hand-written signature!

subtitles.original:
We put lots of love into each and every signature,
so we hope you look forward to it!
subtitles.english:
We put lots of love into each and every signature,
so we hope you look forward to it!

subtitles.original: たくさんの愛情を込めて、サイン書きますね！
subtitles.english: I'll write the signatures with lots of love!

subtitles.original:
Please check out the hololive Official Online Shop and
look for the link in the description or comment area, okay?
subtitles.english:
Please check out the hololive Official Online Shop and
look for the link in the description or comment area, okay?

subtitles.original:
ぜひ、ホロライブ公式ショップを
チェックしてください！
subtitles.english:
Please be sure to check out the
hololive Official Shop!

subtitles.original: Bau bau!
subtitles.english: Bau bau!

subtitles.original: What did you think, Ruffians?
subtitles.english: What did you think, Ruffians?

subtitles.original: Of our birthday merch! Pretty cute, huh?
subtitles.english: Of our birthday merch! Pretty cute, huh?

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: The reservations will be going on sale right
subtitles.english: The reservations will be going on sale right

subtitles.original: after the birthday live here ends, so don't forget, okay?
subtitles.english: after the birthday live here ends, so don't forget, okay?

subtitles.original: 生誕のグッズの予約は、この後開始しますので、
subtitles.english: Pre-orders for the birthday merch will start after this,

subtitles.original: お忘れなくチェックしてください！
subtitles.english: so please don't forget to check it out!

subtitles.original: You can find the link below or on the side here!
subtitles.english: You can find the link below or on the side here!

subtitles.original: Don't forget, okay? Bau bau!
subtitles.english: Don't forget, okay? Bau bau!

subtitles.original: We put a lot of love into it, and Icomochi-mama too!
subtitles.english: We put a lot of love into it, and Icomochi-mama too!

subtitles.original: Time to go, go, go! Go buy it!
subtitles.english: Time to go, go, go! Go buy it!

subtitles.original: Well, we performed
subtitles.english: Well, we performed

subtitles.original: another special collab song with our dear senpai!
subtitles.english: another special collab song with our dear senpai!

subtitles.original: But there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet, right?
subtitles.english: But there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet, right?

subtitles.original: まだ会ってない、謎のゲストが一人いるんだよ！
subtitles.english: There's one mystery guest we haven't met yet!

subtitles.original: Well, should we give the Ruffians a hint?
subtitles.english: Well, should we give the Ruffians a hint?

subtitles.original: Ruffians, who could it be?
subtitles.english: Ruffians, who could it be?

subtitles.original: Hokuro P?
subtitles.english: Hokuro P?

subtitles.original: YAGOO-san?
subtitles.english: YAGOO-san?

subtitles.original: Ah, YAGOO-san! That's a good guess maybe, but...
subtitles.english: Ah, YAGOO-san! That's a good guess maybe, but...

subtitles.original: Well, you should get ready, because...
subtitles.english: Well, you should get ready, because...

subtitles.original: You know, they aren't quite as bad as Pero,
subtitles.english: You know, they aren't quite as bad as Pero,

subtitles.original: but they can get pretty nasty sometimes!
subtitles.english: but they can get pretty nasty sometimes!

subtitles.original: Mococo-chan, you're not going to be rude to our next guest
subtitles.english: Mococo-chan, you're not going to be rude to our next guest

subtitles.original: or anything, right? Especially before calling them out!
subtitles.english: or anything, right? Especially before calling them out!

subtitles.original: We'll see!
subtitles.english: We'll see!

subtitles.original: Well, let's get them out here then!
subtitles.english: Well, let's get them out here then!

subtitles.original: Who could it be? Okay, se-no... douzo!
subtitles.english: Who could it be? Okay, one, two... come on out!

subtitles.original: わわわわ！きたしんや！きたしんや！
subtitles.english: Wa wa wa wa! I've arrived-shin! I've arrived-shin!

subtitles.original: きたしんや！
subtitles.english: I've arrived-shin!

subtitles.original: ポポンちゅー！
subtitles.english: Popon-chu!

subtitles.original: 自己紹介お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please introduce yourself!

subtitles.original: クロちゃんです！わわわわー！
subtitles.english: I'm Kuro-chan! Wa wa wa wa!

subtitles.original: はじめまして！
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: チワワじゃないよ！ふわわだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm not a Chihuahua! I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: ふわわじゃないよ！もここだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm not Fuwawa! I'm Mococo!

subtitles.original: 二人合わせて、ふわもこです！
subtitles.english: Together, we are FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: バウバウ！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Bau bau! Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original:
ふわもこのわちゃわちゃバースデーフェスティバルに
来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english:
Thank you for coming to FuwaMoco's
Wacha Wacha Birthday Festival!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデーだしんよ！ふわもこ！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday-shin! FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: いいしんねー！
subtitles.english: It's great-shin!

subtitles.original:
ちょっとね、視聴者のラフィアンズは
たくさんいると思いますけど、
subtitles.english: I'm sure there are many Ruffians watching,

subtitles.original: クロちゃんがどんな人なのか説明してもらえますか？
subtitles.english: could you explain what kind of person Kuro-chan is?

subtitles.original: 自分でんの？それ？ introduction!
subtitles.english: I have to do it myself? Okay, introduction!

subtitles.original: わかったしんよ。だってこれ海外の人も見てますもんね。
subtitles.english: Got it-shin. People from overseas are watching too, right?

subtitles.original: 海外の人もわかる自己紹介しますからね。
subtitles.english: I'll do a self-introduction that overseas people can understand.

subtitles.original: Nice to meet you, nice to meet you, chu, chu, chu, chu, Tulip!
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you, nice to meet you, chu, chu, chu, chu, Tulip!

subtitles.original: え、困らないで。クロちゃんはチューリップ？
subtitles.english: Wait, don't look puzzled. Kuro-chan is a tulip?

subtitles.original: チューリップ？ No no no!
subtitles.english: Tulip? No no no!

subtitles.original: え、ちょっとまだ分からないかもしれないから。
subtitles.english: Maybe they don't understand yet.

subtitles.original: えーとに、安田大サーカスというトリオを組んでる芸人さんで、
subtitles.english: Well, I'm a comedian in a trio called Yasuda Dai Circus,

subtitles.original: あと豆柴の大群のプロデューサーもやってまして、
subtitles.english: and I'm also the producer for Mameshiba no Taigun,

subtitles.original: 作詞とかもしています、クロちゃんです！バウバウ！
subtitles.english: and I write lyrics too. I'm Kuro-chan! Bau bau!

subtitles.original: じゃあ今度は英語でお願いします！ In English!
subtitles.english: Now do it in English! In English!

subtitles.original: 僕が？自分で？
subtitles.english: Me? By myself?

subtitles.original: え、そんなこと急に言われたら… It's Shine! Flower!
subtitles.english: If you ask me so suddenly... It's Shine! Flower!

subtitles.original: No no no!
subtitles.english: No no no!
